name_cn:
New
【With Box】Burberry TB bag, featuring a TB monogram lock design. The design is not overly complex, simple yet classic, with just the right capacity, interpreting the blend of modernity and traditional elegance. It fits various daily outfits and has won the love of many celebrity fashion icons!!
Size 21-7-14CM
